metadata.name: Enrolment (Pre-primary)
metadata.definition: Individuals officially registered in a pre-primary school level educational programme, regardless of age.

metadata.name: Enrolment (Primary)
metadata.definition: Individuals officially registered in a primary school level educational programme, regardless of age.
metadata.sources: Annual Country Reports (2023), Coutry Office Estimations, Direct government data, GCNF, Global Survey of School Meal Programs (2021), Global Survey of School Meal Programs (2024), Social & Industrial Foodservice Institute in WFP, State of School Feeding Worldwide (2020), WFP, WFP estimations (2019)

metadata.name: Global Diet Quality Score (GDQS) - Menu
metadata.definition: Assesses the nutritional quality of menus in schools and provides insights across four different sub-metrics: Healthy GDQS+, Unhealthy GDQS-, Fortification and Biofortification, and Food Group Diversity.
metadata.sources: GCNF, Global Survey of School Meal Programs (2021), Global Survey of School Meal Programs (2024)

metadata.name: Children receiving school Meals (Total)
metadata.definition: Number of children, across all education levels, who regularly receive food through school meals programmes. This includes full meals, snacks, or food-related support (e.g. take-home rations, vouchers, or cash), whether provided for free or paid.
metadata.sources: Annual Country Reports (2023), Coutry Office Estimations, Direct government data, GCNF, Global Survey of School Meal Programs (2021), Global Survey of School Meal Programs (2024), Social & Industrial Foodservice Institute in WFP, State of School Feeding Worldwide (2020), WFP, WFP estimations (2019)
